title: EDN60 CANCELLED Calculation of Cannabis Duty and Additional Cannabis Duty on Cannabis Oil, Edible Cannabis, Cannabis Extracts and Cannabis Topicals - Canada.ca
content:
## EDN60 CANCELLED Calculation of Cannabis Duty and Additional Cannabis Duty on Cannabis Oil, Edible Cannabis, Cannabis Extracts and Cannabis Topicals

## This publication was cancelled
This publication was cancelled as of 2025-03-19 and replaced by Memorandum EDM6-3, Imposition and payment of duty on cannabis products .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
